overview_section.cpo_tooltip_text: Cost Per Order(CPO) means how much money you spend on ads to get one ad order.
overview_section.roi_tooltip_text: ROI is how much ad revenue you earn for every rupee spent on ads. Example: If you spend ₹1,000 and get ad orders worth ₹4,000, your ROI is 4.
